title: Complex Value Comparisons
context: Gym memberships: Gym A: £35/month, no joining fee, includes classes. Gym B: £25/month + £50 joining fee, classes £5 extra each. Gym C: £30/month, £20 joining fee, 2 free classes/month then £3 each.

questions.question: Total cost for Gym A over 12 months?
Total cost for Gym B over 12 months (no extra classes)?
Gym B with 4 classes per month for 12 months?
If you attend 4 classes per month, which gym is cheapest?
